items.title: ACME Solar secures PPA for 300 MW hybrid wind-solar project in India
items.summary:
ACME Solar has secured a 25-year power purchase agreement (PPA) with Solar Energy Corp. of India Ltd (SECI) for a 300 MW interstate transmission system (ISTS)-connected wind-solar hybrid renewable energy project. The project will supply power at a tariff of $0.034/kWh. 
The post ACME Solar secures PPA for 300 MW hybrid wind-solar project in India appeared first on pv magazine Global.

Right behind that, we have Jackery’s latest Summer Sale lineup with up to 50% power station discounts, like the new 1,024Wh HomePower 1000 v2 Portable Power Station at $549. There’s also the Baseus X1 Pro Dual-Tracking Outdoor Wireless Solar Security Camera at $130, the Autel MaxiCharger Home Level 2 50A Smart EV Charger at $424, and more waiting for you below. As always on Mondays, you can find all the hangover deals from last week down at the bottom of the page in our latest Electrified Weekly roundup edition. 
Head below for other New Green Deals we’ve found today and, of course, Electrek’s best EV buying and leasing deals. Also, check out the new Electrek Tesla Shop for the best deals on Tesla accessories.

items.title: Principia is here to win, and it won’t hesitate to help others do the same
items.summary:
The sun has just about risen on this year’s Electrek Formula Sun Grand Prix (FSGP), the pre-qualifying race before the renowned American Solar Challenge. FSGP officially kicks off tomorrow morning for the teams that have passed rigorous safety and quality checks, known as “scrutineering.”
Over the past few weeks, I’ve had the privilege of speaking directly with teams from around the world, including the Delft Solar Team from the Netherlands and ÉTS Éclipse from Montreal. But for my final profile, I sat down with students from a small liberal arts school just outside St. Louis, right along the Mississippi River. Principia College has a long-running solar car program, which is astonishing considering the school is in the middle of phasing out its only engineering program.
So it was no surprise that after a few minutes speaking with the team’s leadership, I realized the car might end up being the least interesting thing about them.
items.translatedTitle: Principia是来取胜的，它会毫不犹豫地帮助别人做同样的事情

items.title: Will we soon see sodium-ion batteries on electric bikes?
items.summary: For the last couple of years, sodium-ion batteries have been one of the most talked-about “next big things” in the battery world. They promise lower costs, improved safety, and reduced dependence on critical minerals like lithium, cobalt, and nickel. Naturally, that has led many riders to wonder whether the next generation of electric bicycles could ditch lithium altogether.

items.title: Deep learning model improves PV segmentation in remote sensing images
items.summary:
Scientists have developed a deep learning model that improves PV panel segmentation in remote sensing images, by combining state-space modeling with PV-specific geometric features. The Solar-Mamba architecture outperformed CNN-, Transformer-, and Mamba-based models. Researcher: “It's the first of its kind.”
The post Deep learning model improves PV segmentation in remote sensing images appeared first on pv magazine Global.
items.translatedTitle: 深度学习模型改善了遥感图像中的光伏分割

items.title: 1.8GWh Germany BESS moves to construction; 15GWh+ progressed since grid fees decision
items.summary: The shareholders of the 900MW Waltrop BESS project in Germany have approved key infrastructure works for the project, with full construction scheduled for the next few months.
items.translatedTitle: 1.8GWh德国BESS转向建设；自电网费决定以来， 15GWh +取得进展

items.title: MNRE extends ALMM List-II exemption for net-metering and open access solar projects
items.summary: India's renewable energy ministry has extended the exemption from the ALMM List-II on PV cells for net-metering and open-access solar projects until the end of December 2026.
items.translatedTitle: MNRE延长净计量和开放获取太阳能项目的ALMM List-II豁免

items.title: JA begins module shipments for 5.2GW 24/7 Abu Dhabi project, Trina eyes 1.5GW Yemen PV pipeline
items.summary: JA has begun shipping modules under a multi-gigawatt order bound for a 5.2GW “round-the-clock” solar-plus-storage project in Abu Dhabi.
items.translatedTitle: JA开始出货5.2GW 24/7阿布扎比项目模块，天合光电1.5GW也门光伏管道

items.title: Cradle-to-Crisis Approach Improves Battery Safety & Performance
items.summary:
Battery failures can escalate quickly: Heat accumulates, materials break down, and gases ignite in a chain reaction known as thermal runaway. Such events are rare thanks to carefully applied safeguards in material design and battery management systems. Still, continued research is needed to anticipate how new battery materials behave, understand   ... [continued]
The post Cradle-to-Crisis Approach Improves Battery Safety & Performance appeared first on CleanTechnica.
items.translatedTitle: 从摇篮到危机的方法提高了电池的安全性和性能

items.title: Masdar reaches financial close on ‘round-the-clock’ hybrid solar project with 19GWh BESS in UAE
items.summary: UAE state-owned IPP Masdar has reached financial close on what it has claimed is the world’s “first gigascale 24/7 renewable energy project”.
items.translatedTitle: Masdar与阿联酋19GWh BESS的“全天候”混合太阳能项目达成财务结算

items.title: Netherlands proposes stricter rules for solar near airports
items.summary:
The Netherlands is working on a temporary framework governing permits for solar near airports. Trade association Holland Solar has said there is a lack of convincing evidence as to why solar panels have to meet stricter reflection requirements than other surfaces.
The post Netherlands proposes stricter rules for solar near airports  appeared first on pv magazine Global.
items.translatedTitle: 荷兰对机场附近的太阳能提出更严格的规定

items.title: Nibe unveils residential propane air-to-water heat pumps reaching 5.53 COP
items.summary:
Nibe has launched the S2060 series, a range of inverter-controlled air-to-water heat pumps using propane refrigerant for residential and small commercial applications. The monoblock units deliver up to 10 kW of heating capacity and operate with flow temperatures of up to 75 C. 
The post Nibe unveils residential propane air-to-water heat pumps reaching 5.53 COP appeared first on pv magazine Global.
items.translatedTitle: Nibe推出住宅丙烷空气对水热泵，达到5.53 COP

items.title: EU releases Electrification Action Plan, reaffirms 200GW 2030 energy storage target
items.summary: The European Commission has released its final Electrification Action Plan, reaffirming its belief that the bloc needs 200GW of energy storage by 2030.
items.translatedTitle: 欧盟发布电气化行动计划，重申2030年200GW储能目标

items.title: Middle East, Southeast Asia and India emerge as key alternate manufacturing hubs to China
items.summary: As the battery storage market continues its strong growth trajectory, battery manufacturers are ramping up production to meet increased demand.
items.translatedTitle: 中东、东南亚和印度成为中国的主要替代制造业中心

items.title: 全球首发技术路线+全域联盟双轮破局，AI for ADANES释放先进核能新质生产力
States join fight against Trump administration’s wind farm blockade
items.summary: A coalition of 18 states and Washington, D.C., has moved to join an industry lawsuit challenging the Department of Defense’s freeze on onshore wind projects in America.  It’s the latest in a nearly yearlong saga during which the Trump administration has obstructed more than 155 land-based wind projects across the…
items.translatedTitle: 各州参与打击特朗普政府的风电场封锁

items.title: Hithium looks to replicate residential solution ARKVOLT’s Asian success into Europe
items.summary: Hithium, an integrated energy storage solutions provider known for its leadership in long-duration energy storage, is now seeing strong momentum across its residential businesses and C&I. We discussed this with the company at the Smarter E Europe trade show in Germany last month.
items.translatedTitle: Hithium希望将住宅解决方案ARKVOLT的亚洲成功复制到欧洲

items.title: CHINT: Bridging AI infrastructure and energy transition through integrated power solutions
items.summary: CHINT Global's Beibei Zheng discusses how the company is responding to Europe's dual challenge of AI sovereignty and energy security.
items.translatedTitle: CHINT ：通过集成电源解决方案连接人工智能基础设施和能源转型

items.title: Lodestone Energy begins work on 31.5MWp solar PV plant in New Zealand
items.summary: Lodestone Energy and Centralines have started construction on the 31.5MWp Central Hawke's Bay solar PV power plant.
items.translatedTitle: Lodestone Energy开始在新西兰建设31.5MWp太阳能光伏电站

items.title: Australia adds 9.1GW of new generation and storage in FY26 with battery storage dominating
items.summary: Australia's NEM connected 9.1GW of new generation and energy storage to full output in FY26, more than double the result achieved in FY25.
items.translatedTitle: 澳大利亚在26财年新增9.1GW新一代和储能，电池储能占主导地位

items.title: An old-school geothermal giant rides the tech’s newfound popularity
items.summary: Over two decades ago, Ormat Technologies began a big experiment on a swath of rugged land near the Hot Springs Mountains in western Nevada.  The geothermal company was already producing electricity there, using the heat found naturally in hot water and steam trapped beneath the earth’s surface. But in 2002, Ormat and…
items.translatedTitle: 老派地热巨头乘坐这项技术新发现的人气

items.title: Massachusetts bill would end a costly gas pipeline repair program
items.summary: Massachusetts state senators are taking aim at a pipeline replacement program they say is inflating natural gas bills while doing little to make the system safer.  The Senate earlier this month passed a sweeping energy-affordability bill that aims to save consumers roughly $14 billion over the next 10 years. One way…
items.translatedTitle: 马萨诸塞州的法案将结束一项昂贵的天然气管道修复计划

Technical, political, and supply chain challenges are complicating data center buildouts around the U.S.

items.title: Charging Infrastructure Has Far Outpaced EV Sales In All But One EU Country — Analysis
items.summary:
Only Malta falls short on the EU’s fleet-based target for public charging. All but one EU country are meeting the bloc’s targets for EV charging infrastructure to keep pace with the number of EVs on the road, new research shows. The analysis by T&E also finds that most of the   ... [continued]
The post Charging Infrastructure Has Far Outpaced EV Sales In All But One EU Country — Analysis appeared first on CleanTechnica.
items.translatedTitle: 除了一个欧盟国家外，充电基础设施的销售速度远远超过电动汽车—分析
